description: Strict Pong fs1/stack1 full 6-action 1M: 7 models × 2 settings × 5 seeds
notes: Initial array 58160888 tasks 0-69 with concurrency 20 produced 20/70 valid units.
Rerun array 58170421 contains the exact 50 invalid task IDs (10 failed S5 plus 40 preempted), concurrency 20.
In 58170421, 35 non-ANN units exited before training because the isolated archive lacked ignored atari_param_match.json; the symlink was added and only those 35 units were resubmitted as 58170974.
Rerun deployment root /home/js3269/projects/FAW_RNN-pong-fs1-rerun-79b5a63 at commit 79b5a63dfc987720bdfd194c8264361b9b745006; results and logs link to this manifest remote_root.
S5 uses non-fused Adam because its complex parameters are unsupported by fused Adam; supported non-S5 models retain fused Adam.
Partial preempted metrics histories are renamed to metrics_history.pre_rerun_<job>_<task>.jsonl before fresh training and are not deleted.
